title: Rename push_redirect/2 to push_navigate/2
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/redirect_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.RedirectLive) that handles handle_event("go_home", _params, socket) by calling push_navigate(socket, to: ~p"/"). mount/3 returns {:ok, socket}. Render any content you want.
tier_rationale: Single-name renaming of a deprecated helper. Canonical replacement per official migration guide.
research_citation: Phoenix LiveView live-navigation docs: push_redirect/2 deprecated in favor of push_navigate/2
